description_long: This object is a set of four hard hats, each with a rounded dome shape and a short, outwardly flared brim encircling the base. The helmets are made of a rigid material, likely molded plastic or metal, and come in muted colors such as olive green, brown, and gray. Each helmet features a central ridge running from front to back, providing structural reinforcement and a distinctive visual line. The surface finish is matte, with no visible gloss or shine, and the texture appears slightly rough, suggesting a utilitarian design. There are no visible ventilation holes, visors, or graphic designs on the helmets, and no retention systems such as straps or buckles are apparent. These helmets are typical of those used for construction, industrial, or civil defense purposes in urban environments.
description: A set of four matte-finished, dome-shaped hard hats in muted colors with a central ridge and no visible graphics or straps. The helmets have a utilitarian, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded domes, central ridges, and the short brims of all four helmets.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back curvature and the continuous brims of the helmets.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the central ridges and the color differences among the helmets.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to view 1, showing the back of the helmets and the uniformity of their shape.
